name: scala40
description: Scala 40 (Scala Quaranta) card game — Game Boy style, with online multiplayer

scripts.test: node test/rules.test.js && node test/engine.test.js && node test/stats.test.js
scripts.ios: npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.android: npx cap add android && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
